title: rosa canina var. andegavensis
intro: Rosa canina var. andegavensis, also known as the Pyrenean rose or Andean rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina plant native to the mountainous regions of the Pyrenees. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. andegavensis include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
